*DEFENDANT MOBILE AIRWAVES, INC.'S, (A corporation fka CYBERDATING INTERNATIONAL, INC.) Motion To Set Aside Default & Default Judgment, request for judicial notice -- OFF CALENDAR -- Order setting aside default per stipulation entered 12/3/02. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647 (JJM/301)

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On August 6,2002.
Off Calendar Aug-06-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on calendar this day for default prove-up hearing, Harold Auerbach, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Court accepts declaration in lieu of live testimony. Good cause appeaing, Court awards judgment to plaintiff and against defendant as follows: Principal $79, 420; Interest, $16,329.72; Costs $254.00 and Civil Code Section 1719 damages $1,500; for the total sum of $97,503.72.
